---
title: "Insights"
subtitle: "Practical notes on statistical practice, modeling, and analytical tooling."
body-classes: "ed-page"
listing:
  contents: "**/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  date-format: long
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, reading-time]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 30
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    page-layout: article
ai-summary:
  banner-title: "Yapper Labs | AI Summary"
  model-title: "Model: ChatGPT o1"
  model-img: "/images/openai-white-monoblossom.svg"
  summary: "Posts about interactive teaching with webR and Quarto, plus working notes on data visualization, tooling, and reproducible workflows. Older posts are kept under the site's Archive."
---
